user.title: Connect to Qobuz
user.description:
Qobuz requires a session token instead of your password.

**How to get your token:**
1. Open https://play.qobuz.com in your browser and log in.
2. Press **F12** → **Application** tab → **Local Storage** → **https://play.qobuz.com**
3. Click the **localuser** row and copy the **token** value.
4. Paste it below.

The token typically lasts several days. You will be prompted to refresh it when it expires.

data.user_auth_token: User Auth Token (from browser Local Storage)
data.app_id: App ID (leave blank to use default)

error.invalid_auth: Token is invalid or expired. Please extract a fresh token from play.qobuz.com (see setup instructions above).
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
